prompt: When synthesis confirms pressure edge, choose raise.
why_v1: Raise applies pressure when stack depth and price support aggression.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. Raising fits when depth, price, and playability line up to create a real pressure edge.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. Raise is stronger when depth, price, and playability all point in the same direction and create a real pressure edge. When stacks are deep enough to punish capped continues, the aggressive line earns more than a passive one.
